text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My name is Nishino Flower. Starting today, my
trainer and I will be taking on the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I entered Tracen Academy early after skipping
some grades. I'm already race-ready, but I still
have a lot of growing to do, both physically and
mentally. I'm not sure if I'll be able to run well...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer is working really hard and doing
everything possible for me, so I want to return the
favor as well!
